issueTitle: tasks-mux: missing CLI commands and MCP tools
prompt: Implement issue #597 by adding the missing tasks-mux CLI commands, MCP tools, MCP breakpoint resource, and resource subscription notifications while preserving existing behavior.
requiredMcpResources: resource subscription notifications for breakpoint state changes

knownCurrentSurface.cliProgram: packages/tasks-mux/src/cli/program.ts currently registers ask, responders, breakpoints, server, responder-loop, and auth.
knownCurrentSurface.breakpointsCli: packages/tasks-mux/src/cli/commands/breakpoints.ts currently implements pending, answer, status, and poll.
knownCurrentSurface.mcpServer: packages/tasks-mux/src/mcp/server.ts currently registers ask_breakpoint, check_breakpoint_status, list_breakpoints, answer_breakpoint, verify_breakpoint_answer, list_responders, claim_breakpoint, and poll_breakpoints.
knownCurrentSurface.backend: packages/tasks-mux/src/backend.ts already includes cancelBreakpoint and optional claimBreakpoint, but not broader search, assignment, comments, escalation, templates, or rules contracts.
